name: TMP-UT-ORUSERINPUTOFA
title: or user input of a Utah user (with narrow exception). of an order issued for a violation of - Using a Utah user's input to facilitate targeted advertising. the law. - Advertising a specific product or service to a Utah user in a conversation unless an appropriate disclaimer is provided identifying the relevant advertisement and any agreement / sponsorship to promote it. • Requires a mental health chatbot to clearly and conspicuously disclose that it is an AI technology (and not a human) to users before they begin to use the chatbot, upon commencement of any chatbot session (if the user has not accessed the chatbot within the previous 7 days), and whenever a user asks whether they are interacting with AI.
